window_summary: This window tracks the recent bevyengine/bevy release stream from v0.14.0-rc.4 through v0.19.0-rc.2, including stable releases, patch fixes, and release candidates. It covers the evolution of the Bevy game engine across multiple minor versions and their associated pre-releases.

options.text: v0.15.0 includes a link to a release announcement and a migration guide from 0.14 to 0.15, while v0.14.0 includes a link to a release announcement and a migration guide from 0.13 to 0.14.

v0.15.0 lists new fixes since v0.15.0-rc.3, while v0.14.0 lists new fixes since v0.14.0-rc.4.
